name: humanoid-balance
title: Whole-body balance for a humanoid
summary: An ankle/hip balance strategy: command the center of pressure ahead of the center of mass (capture-point style) to pull the CoM back over the support polygon. Proves the contract spans HUMANOIDS — a 20-DoF whole-body policy reacting to CoM, every joint bounded by the envelope.

pre: standing, feet flat, CoM near the support-polygon center
post: CoM kept within the support polygon under disturbance
no per-tick step exceeded the cap
